title: Illager Warship
description: adds a Giant Illager Warship to the oceans
body:
**This mod adds a Giant Illager Warship to the oceans, packed with loot and valuable goods.**

![Ship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b258d763e6dbfa249fa99bb9afe5757b2f08a9e8.jpeg)
- Spawns: The ship appears in all Ocean biomes.
- Illager Crew: The warship is guarded by various Illagers who protect the treasure onboard.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a221cfd72e37061371562ae1d45e82fbf67dffb.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
